tests.name: ΤΚΕ
tests.notes: Increases with age — rough rule: M: age/2, F: (age+10)/2

tests.name: CRP
tests.notes: Some labs use <0,5 as normal. Doctor's notes use ΦΤ <6

tests.name: hs-CRP
tests.notes: High-sensitivity CRP for cardiovascular risk. <1 low risk, 1-3 moderate, >3 high

ocr_traps.TKE_vs_TKG: ΤΚΕ can be misread as ΤΚΓ
ocr_traps.CRP_scale: Watch units — some labs report in mg/dL (range <0,6), others mg/L (range <6). A value of 0,36 is likely mg/dL with ΦΤ <6 meaning mg/L context
